texto: While it is true that Frank had a great sense of humor, he was also very serious about composing music. In reality there are only a handful of skilled players who can play his most complex pieces. It takes a lot of patience to learn and requires a fantastic memory.
explicacao: Citação de Dweezil Zappa sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “While it is true that Frank had a great sense of humor, he was also very serious about composing …” articula sabedoria, music, patience em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como patience e great.
